rulings.Case Title: PHILIP GILBERT, ET AL. VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set The Deposition Of Dr. Alvin Schonfeld After The Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, February 21, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to set the deposition of Dr. Alvin Schonfeld after the trial date: hearing required. The hearing will be at 11:15am at trial call, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
